jsonLd.title: Thyrocare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Thyrocare in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Thyrocare:
Thyrocare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thyrocare!
